entry.title: there’s an open door that can lead me to forever
entry.summary:
Author: mrsrumbles

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,281Chapters: 4/5Kudos: 88

Summary: Arthur grows up with Merlin in Ealdor. One day, Camelot’s knights arrive to tell him he’s their prince. “Are you really a prince?” Merlin wondered quietly.”It’s mad.”“Their emblem is a dragon.”Arthur froze and turned around to look at him. “Do you think that might mean something?”

entry.title: Long Live the King
entry.summary:
Author: AquaLetti

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,001Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: After Arthur is attacked yet again, Merlin only manages to save him at a great cost: revealing his magic to everyone. Uther obviously immediately orders Merlin's execution for using magic, but Arthur can't let it happen...

entry.title: A New Camelot: What if Arthur Lived
entry.summary:
Author: RoyallyKikiPendragon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,710Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 1

Summary: Merthur. Arthur and Merlin make it to the lake just in time. Arthur is saved! But as they return to Camelot, all's not as they left and who is responsible for it all? The queen. Secrets now exposed. Gwen's betrayal brings on whole new level of torture. Arthur and Merlin struggle to dethrone her, but when they do, they banish her. What new struggles do they face?

entry.title: [Podfic of] One Hundred Forty-Three Point Five Degrees
entry.summary:
Author: vexbatch pods (vexbatch)

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: Audio Length: 32:15"You've got to be fucking kidding me," Merlin all but shouted, throwing his satchel onto the desk and glaring at the equation string stretching across the entire whiteboard. "Again?" “Professor Emrys, sir?" Drea raised her hand tentatively. "Could it be that, well, maybe Professor Pendragon is trying to send you a message?" "Yeah, a message that he's a complete git," Merlin muttered.Literature professor Merlin Emrys absolutely loathes arrogant, condescending Arthur Pendragon, professor of applied mathematics, who claims maths is a universal language... and lectures right before him in the same hall, always leaving the board a mess.

entry.title: Destiny Shivers
entry.summary:
Author: Chaotic_Thirst_Goblin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 200Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Merlin knows better than anyone that Arthur belongs to Albion, legends, and a future already written prophecy and secrets. But he takes every moment as they come, and he and Arthur form a bond, and find love that might just change their destiny after all. This collection of 100-word drabbles will share tales about about magic, kisses, devotion, destiny, and the precarious experience of loving someone history thinks it's already claimed. For the Come What May challenge on Tumblr.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: You’re all the courage i need
entry.summary:
Author: the0writers0ghost

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,604Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 42

Summary: 1,300 years after the death of the once and future king and Merlin is living a mundane domestic life in central London. Until a vision strikes him and Arthur is once again back in his life. Thus follows a modern AU which sees Arthur repress feelings like there is no tomorrow and Merlin being so done with his shit. Enjoy!

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,719Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon's protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon's curse begins to stir - and Uther Pendragon's madness stands as a warning - Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

entry.title: Firebug
entry.summary:
Author: seraknockiddy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,012Chapters: 5/13Kudos: 4

Summary: A series of mysterious fires has been terrorizing the small town of Colchester for months now. Uther Pendragon, the incumbent mayor, finds this anything but amusing - especially so close to the town's bi-thousandth anniversary celebrations. Consequently, he has no choice but to call in outside help to restore peace to his beautiful town (and ensure his re-election next year). Arthur - his son and the chief of the local fire department - is far from thrilled at the prospect of being scrutinized by a conceited big-city inspector. Not that he has anything to hide, mind you; in fact, he feels he has had the situation quite well under control on his own - until another fire nearly costs one of his crew members their life ...

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 97,570Chapters: 16/19Kudos: 16

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear, and others are made which may destroy them both. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?

entry.title: Cheekbones & Consequences
entry.summary:
Author: amariis28

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,388Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 30

Summary: This wasn’t supposed to happen.At all.But Merlin could never help it, could he?He just had to stick his nose somewhere it was never needed.Now, he was suffering the consequences.He’s been in this position before though. Many times. In fact, if he could recall the number of times he’d begrudgingly sat on this very desk, that had his initials carved from the amount of times he’s been there, he wouldn’t have enough fingers to put down. That includes his toes too.Right next to him, sat Gwaine. Of course, triumphant marked his face. He seemed to enjoy this a lot.*[work in progress]

entry.title: Once and Future Mikaelson
entry.summary:
Author: arcaneroa

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,290Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 24

Summary: What if Merlin's loneliness changed everything? One frustrated spell didn't just give him a second chance; it rebirthed him in New Orleans as the only son of Klaus and Hayley Mikaelson. When Arthur returns, the same young king Merlin once knew, finds a world full of magic, monsters, and surprises... and a Merlin who's grown in ways he never imagined.

entry.title: this one is different, because it's us
entry.summary:
Author: urmomsboyfriend

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,690Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 318

Summary: Never in his royal tutelage was he told what to do when slimy, slithering men insinuate that he seeks company that isn’t his husband. Why did no one think to prepare him for this? “Your silence betrays your guilt, Pendragon,” Rodreck grins, and then raises his hands in placation. “Don’t worry, we certainly won’t tell. It’s only natural to have a few sweet things tucked away. A squire here, a stableboy there, a handful of whores when the mood calls for it.” And finally, Arthur has had enough. . In which Arthur has to sit through yet another feast when he would rather be with Merlin, only this one is made much worse when his guests begin asking questions about his consort, and then about his loyalty to said consort. What follows after the feast is a collapse onto the bed as Arthur spends the rest of his night in Merlin’s arms.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: RedPanda25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,436Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 19

Summary: The narration of Arthur's thoughts while he knows that he is dying in the ending of the series. Merlin is there. Has always been there and it is only now that Arthur is dying that he truly realizes how much Merlin has done. And how much Arthur loves Merlin.

entry.title: Magical Mayhem
entry.summary:
Author: SyphontheNightFury

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,859Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Everyone knows the stories. About the Golden Kingdom of Camelot, Her Just King Arthur, and his Wondrous Magician, Merlin. There are many renditions of this beloved tale, and yet, there are still Questions. 'What if Arthur had met the dragon first' for example...

entry.title: Love and Protect
entry.summary:
Author: Timatimmy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,840Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 36

Summary: Merlin flees Ealdor with nothing but a pack on his back and his mother’s desperate instructions: "go to Camelot, hide with Gaius, and keep your head down." With King Cenred hunting for the powerful young warlock born on his borders, the heart of Uther Pendragon's anti-magic kingdom seems like the last place Merlin should be safe.   ​But when an arrogant crown prince risks his life to fetch a cure for a dying servant—guided through the dark by a mysterious, floating orb of blue light—everything changes. Arthur knows Merlin's secret. And instead of execution, Arthur makes a silent, fierce vow: he will protect his clumsy servant, no matter the cost, until he can reshape Camelot into a kingdom safe enough for the man he is secretly falling for.

entry.title: The Prince, The Warlock & The Healer
entry.summary:
Author: Heratakescamelot

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,040Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Hera was just looking for a way to escape her master's thesis and, more generally, the impending collapse of her adult life. She didn't expect the universe to take her so literally that it would hurl her straight into the Sixth Century. Trading academic deadlines for Uther Pendragon’s executioner's block was a trauma, but at least no one in Camelot is asking her if she’s finished her bibliography yet. Hidden away in Gaius’s chambers, Hera tries to navigate a world of ancient stones and fierce laws, where she quickly discovers she isn't just an intruder: she is the catalyst uncovering the unspeakable desires that bind Arthur Pendragon and Merlin to one another.

entry.title: O Waly, Waly
entry.summary:
Author: rosy_glass

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,260Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 176

Summary: While hunting for a Griffin terrorizing Camelot, Arthur stumbles upon a beautiful boy injured by the beast in the forest and decides to save him. It is only later that Arthur learns that he is not, as Arthur had believed, a regular boy or a prince, but a rare male dryad named Merlin. As Fate would have it, their paths cross many more times. With each encounter, Arthur's curiosity deepens into something far too warm and tender to acknowledge. Perhaps it is the thrill of meeting a creature of myths with powerful magic, or perhaps it is Merlin's captivating sea blue eyes, but Arthur cannot stay away for long.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
